cards.title: Loop Invariant
cards.governance_note: Define initialization, maintenance, progress, termination, and usefulness.

cards.title: Recursive Progress
cards.governance_note: Define base case, recursive case, progress measure, combination step, and depth guard.

cards.title: Path Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve branch, loop, error, asynchronous, and human-review paths through audit evidence.
